'''Shadren V''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim's]] [[Shadren system/Legends|Shadren system]]. It had an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Imperial Navy/Legends|naval]] base, which was attacked by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].
